'''zhoyangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xanthelasmic|xanthelasmic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xanthelasmic|xanthelasmic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhoyangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoyangithi|zhoyangithi]] || [[word:zhoyangiji|zhoyangiji]] || [[word:zhoyangishi|zhoyangishi]] || [[word:zhoyangiki|zhoyangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoyanguthuthu|zhoyanguthuthu]] || [[word:zhoyangujuju|zhoyangujuju]] || [[word:zhoyangushushu|zhoyangushushu]] || [[word:zhoyangukuku|zhoyangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoyanguthu|zhoyanguthu]] || [[word:zhoyanguju|zhoyanguju]] || [[word:zhoyangushu|zhoyangushu]] || [[word:zhoyanguku|zhoyanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoyangufthuf|zhoyangufthuf]] || [[word:zhoyangufjuf|zhoyangufjuf]] || [[word:zhoyangufshuf|zhoyangufshuf]] || [[word:zhoyangufkuf|zhoyangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoyangethe|zhoyangethe]] || [[word:zhoyangeje|zhoyangeje]] || [[word:zhoyangeshe|zhoyangeshe]] || [[word:zhoyangeke|zhoyangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoyangothotho|zhoyangothotho]] || [[word:zhoyangojojo|zhoyangojojo]] || [[word:zhoyangoshosho|zhoyangoshosho]] || [[word:zhoyangokoko|zhoyangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoyangotho|zhoyangotho]] || [[word:zhoyangojo|zhoyangojo]] || [[word:zhoyangosho|zhoyangosho]] || [[word:zhoyangoko|zhoyangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoyangofthof|zhoyangofthof]] || [[word:zhoyangofjof|zhoyangofjof]] || [[word:zhoyangofshof|zhoyangofshof]] || [[word:zhoyangofkof|zhoyangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoyangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŠthĂŠ|zhoyangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŠjĂŠ|zhoyangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŠshĂŠ|zhoyangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoyangĂŠkĂŠ|zhoyangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoyangathatha|zhoyangathatha]] || [[word:zhoyangajaja|zhoyangajaja]] || [[word:zhoyangashasha|zhoyangashasha]] || [[word:zhoyangakaka|zhoyangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoyangatha|zhoyangatha]] || [[word:zhoyangaja|zhoyangaja]] || [[word:zhoyangasha|zhoyangasha]] || [[word:zhoyangaka|zhoyangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoyangafthaf|zhoyangafthaf]] || [[word:zhoyangafjaf|zhoyangafjaf]] || [[word:zhoyangafshaf|zhoyangafshaf]] || [[word:zhoyangafkaf|zhoyangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhoyangasha|zhoyangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoyangshĂ«asha|zhoyangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoyangroasha|zhoyangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoyangmuasha|zhoyangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoyangyaasha|zhoyangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoyangnkshĂ«asha|gozhoyangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoyangnkroasha|gozhoyangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoyangnkmuasha|gozhoyangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoyangnkyaasha|gozhoyangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhoyayangasha|zhoyayangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoyayangshĂ«asha|zhoyayangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoyayangroasha|zhoyayangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoyayangmuasha|zhoyayangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoyayangyaasha|zhoyayangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoyayangnkshĂ«asha|gozhoyayangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoyayangnkroasha|gozhoyayangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoyayangnkmuasha|gozhoyayangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoyayangnkyaasha|gozhoyayangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zheyĂŠngasha|zheyĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zheyĂŠngshĂ«asha|zheyĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zheyĂŠngroasha|zheyĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zheyĂŠngmuasha|zheyĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zheyĂŠngyaasha|zheyĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozheyĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|gozheyĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozheyĂŠngnkroasha|gozheyĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozheyĂŠngnkmuasha|gozheyĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozheyĂŠngnkyaasha|gozheyĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhoyfangasha|zhoyfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoyfangshĂ«asha|zhoyfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoyfangroasha|zhoyfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoyfangmuasha|zhoyfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoyfangyaasha|zhoyfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoyfangnkshĂ«asha|gozhoyfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoyfangnkroasha|gozhoyfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoyfangnkmuasha|gozhoyfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoyfangnkyaasha|gozhoyfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
